channel.title: Abouts on zvlfahmi's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on zvlfahmi's Personal Blog

item.title: About
item.description: Hello! My Name is Zulfahmi Azka, i’m a hobbyist and self-taught programmer and photographer. I’m an Islamic High School student from Indonesia, I primarily code in C++. This is my personal blog Github : zvlfahmi Discord : zvlfahmi
